nasb.text: Therefore, thus says the Lord God, “Because you have spoken falsehood and seen a lie, therefore behold, I am against you,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God: “Because you have uttered falsehood and seen lying visions, therefore behold, I am against you, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：“因為你們所說的是虛假，所見的是欺詐，因此我就攻擊你們。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 所以主耶和华说：“因为你们的假异象和谎言，我要攻击你们。这是主耶和华说的。
